purpose: Record all raw data sources and their state at research initiation

knownLimitations: Turnover field is always 0 (Tencent qfqday does not provide it)
Pre-reconciled prices mean historical prices are adjusted for all corporate actions

financialData.impact: Fundamental features (PE, ROE, debt ratio) will be stale for 1-4 months in historical snapshots

sectorClassification.method: Name-matching against 8 hardcoded sector keyword sets
sectorClassification.alternative: Eastmoney f100 industry code (current snapshot only, no history)
